diary_entries.entry: Population: 35. Small meteorite impacts near colony. I spent the year on sabotage. Closest to Selene.
Year 80 on Mars. Small meteorite impacts near colony. Morale is hopeful. We have 162 food units left.
Another year. Small meteorite impacts near colony. The colony feels hopeful. My resolve grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Ares (year 80): 'If I can spawn a sub-simulation to test governance, who spawned the simulation I live in to test THEIR governance?'
